recommendations.title: Black Clover: Sword of the Wizard King
recommendations.overview: As a lionhearted boy who can't wield magic strives for the title of Wizard King, four banished Wizard Kings of yore return to crush the Clover Kingdom.

recommendations.title: Orion and the Dark
recommendations.overview: A boy with an active imagination faces his fears on an unforgettable journey through the night with his new friend: a giant, smiling creature named Dark.

recommendations.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
recommendations.overview: Long ago, in the fantasy world of Kumandra, humans and dragons lived together in harmony. But when an evil force threatened the land, the dragons sacrificed themselves to save humanity. Now, 500 years later, that same evil has returned and it’s up to

recommendations.title: 7 Dwarves: The Forest Is Not Enough
recommendations.overview: Snow White asks the seven dwarfs for help, because if they don't manage to find out the name of a little boy (Rumpelstiltskin) within two days, her newborn child will be taken away from her. The journey takes the dwarves to a depressive, rhyming Pino

recommendations.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: It's been ten years since the dragons moved to the Hidden World, and even though Toothless doesn't live in New Berk anymore, Hiccup continues the holiday traditions he once shared with his best friend. But the Vikings of New Berk were beginning to fo

recommendations.title: Howl's Moving Castle
recommendations.overview: Sophie, a young milliner, is turned into an elderly woman by a witch who enters her shop and curses her. She encounters a wizard named Howl and gets caught up in his resistance to fighting for the king.

recommendations.title: Samson
recommendations.overview: After losing the love of his life to a cruel Philistine prince, a young Hebrew with Supernatural strength defends his people, sacrificing everything to avenge his love, his people, and his God.

recommendations.title: Heavy Metal
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Fantasy, Music
recommendations.overview: The embodiment of ultimate evil, a glowing orb terrorizes a young girl with bizarre stories of dark fantasy, eroticism and horror.
recommendations.director: Paul Sabella, John Bruno, John Halas, Julian Harris, Jack Stokes, Pino Van Lamsweerde, Jimmy T. Murakami, Barrie Nelson, Harold Whitaker, Gerald Potterton

recommendations.title: Ne Zha
recommendations.overview: A young boy is born as the reincarnation of a demonic power, into a society that hates and fears him. Destined by prophecy to bring destruction to the world, Nezha must choose between good and evil to see if he can change his fate.

recommendations.title: Dragon Rider
recommendations.overview: An unlikely trio of heroes – a dragon, a boy and a forest brownie – embark on an epic adventure to find the “Rim of Heaven” - the mythological safe haven for all dragons.
